products.title: Blue Star 2 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC (IC524DNUR)
products.short_description: Blue Star 2 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC with 5-in-1 convertible cooling, copper condenser, AI Pro cooling, and energy-efficient performance for medium to large rooms.
products.long_description: The Blue Star 2 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC (IC524DNUR) is designed for powerful and efficient cooling in medium to large rooms (151–200 sq.ft). It features a 5-in-1 convertible cooling mode that adjusts power based on room conditions for better energy savings. Built with 100% copper components and anti-corrosive Blue Fin coating, it ensures long-lasting durability. The AI Pro technology intelligently adjusts temperature and fan speed based on ambient conditions, delivering optimal comfort. With high ambient cooling support up to 54°C, this AC performs reliably even in extreme heat conditions. It also includes self-diagnosis, dust filter, and eco mode for efficient usage.
highlights: 2 Ton capacity ideal for medium-large rooms
Copper condenser with Blue Fin protection
cons: Smart features may require extra setup charge
Noise slightly noticeable at high speed

positive: Good energy savings in eco mode
negative: Some noise reported at high fan speed
Missing parts reported in rare cases

offers: Cashback up to ₹1,601 on select cards
